prompt: Use Conventional Commits format: <type>(<scope>): <description>. Keep the subject under 72 characters. Use scopes that match the changed package, module, or feature area. Write clear imperative summaries without trailing punctuation. When committing updates to CHANGELOG.md, focus the message on what the changelog update is for (e.g., 'docs(changelog): update for custom 404 page') rather than listing the internal changelog details. Include a short body with bullet points only when the change is complex. Do not include explanations outside the commit message.
